candidates.name: Outbound Email Sequence Interval Optimizer
candidates.pitch: Connects to Gmail via API, analyzes reply rates against send timestamps, then surfaces optimal spacing per contact. Freemium with Stripe. Buildable in 3 weeks. Cold email tools don't optimize timing —
candidates.pain: Sales reps send follow-ups at random intervals missing the optimal reply windows.

candidates.name: Accessibility Color Pair Batch Tester
candidates.pitch: Scrapes all CSS custom properties from the page, pairs foreground/background combinations, and scores each against WCAG 2.1. Renders a matrix overlay in DevTools. Single-pass page analysis, no backend
candidates.pain: Auditing color contrast across a full design system takes manual inspection in each tool.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: LinkedIn Profile Fit Scorecard
candidates.pitch: Extracts headline, experience, skills, and activity metrics from LinkedIn profiles, scoring them against a configurable ideal candidate profile. Exports comparison cards. Buildable in 2 weeks via Link
candidates.pain: Recruiters and sales reps manually assess LinkedIn profiles without standardized comparison criteria.

candidates.name: Terminal Command Session Searcher
candidates.pitch: Indexes zsh/bash history files locally, provides a popup search UI for fuzzy-matching past commands with timestamps. Privacy-preserving — data stays local. Buildable in 1 week. Shell history search is
candidates.pain: Developers can't search shell history across terminal sessions when debugging past commands.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: PR Description Changelog Tracker
candidates.pitch: Polls GitHub API on PR description edits and diffs the markdown. Notifies reviewers when descriptions mutate. Buildable with GitHub GraphQL API in 1 week. Solves the silent scope creep problem with mi
candidates.pain: PR descriptions change after review but nobody notices requirements shifted silently.

candidates.name: Figma Annotation Thread Exporter
candidates.pitch: Connects to Figma API, extracts comment threads with screenshots, and formats them into Jira/Linear tickets. Buildable in 2 weeks. Design handoff friction is real — developers manually copy-paste feed
candidates.pain: Design feedback in Figma threads gets lost instead of converting into tracked tickets.

candidates.name: Stripe Webhook Delivery Sequence Replay
candidates.pitch: Intercepts Stripe webhook deliveries, stores payloads locally, and renders a timeline UI showing retry attempts and response codes. Uses Chrome storage API. Buildable in 1 week. Developers spend hours
candidates.pain: Debugging Stripe webhook failures requires reconstructing event timelines from logs manually.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: API Endpoint Ownership Registry Overlay
candidates.pitch: Parses OpenAPI specs or network traffic to build an endpoint inventory, then overlays ownership metadata from a config file or Jira. Surfaces owner avatars on API calls. Buildable in 3 weeks.
candidates.pain: Teams don't know who owns which API endpoint causing slow response on breaking change decisions.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)
